metadata.title: Memora — Your travel journal
metadata.description: A premium personal travel portfolio. Document journeys, days, and moments — beautifully.

imageUpload.dragDropHint: Or drag and drop an image here
imageUpload.constraints: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP · max 5 MB
imageUpload.tooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller

hero.title: Every journey deserves a beautiful archive
hero.subtitle: Document your adventures day by day — places, meals, photos, and the small moments that matter. A travel portfolio that feels like a journal, not a dashboard.

guest.exploreDescription: Create an account to document adventures day by day and share them when you're ready.
guest.exploreCardDescription: Sign in or create an account to start your journal and open your public profile.

member.exploreDescription: View your public profile or keep adding adventures from the dashboard.

featured.title: Featured journeys
featured.subtitle: Stories from travelers mapping the world one day at a time

features.title: Built for the way you travel

journal.title: Day-by-day journal
journal.description: Organize every adventure into days and moments — notes, photos, places, and more.

visual.title: Visual & editorial
visual.description: A layout designed for storytelling, not spreadsheets. Your travels deserve better.

portfolio.title: Your travel portfolio
portfolio.description: A personal archive that grows with every journey — ready to share when you are.

profile.noTrips: You don't have any adventures yet.
profile.noTripsDescription: When journeys are added, they'll appear here.

trip.notFoundDescription: This journey may have been moved or removed.

day.noEventsDescription: This day is waiting for its first entry.

dayActivities.pickerHint: What kind of day was it? Tap up to 3 tags.
dayActivities.pickerLimit: Deselect a tag to choose a different one.

momentLocation.label: Location
momentLocation.mapHint: Click the map to drop a pin

contact.title: Send a message
contact.description: Reach out about collaborations, questions, or just to say hello.
contact.name: Name

errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

trips.title: Adventures
trips.emptyDescription: When adventures are set to Public visibility, they'll appear here as a travel portfolio.

photos.title: Photo highlights
photos.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# frame from the adventure} other {# frames from the adventure}}

cloudContent.title: Drone & cloud footage
cloudContent.subtitle: Large files live in cloud storage — Memora keeps the links so you can watch anytime.

cloudLink.sectionDescription: Large drone videos and raw travel content live in cloud storage — Memora stores only the link.
cloudLink.emptyDescription: Paste a share link from Google Drive, iCloud, Dropbox, or OneDrive for large files you don't host here.
cloudLink.addDialogDescription: The app stores only the URL — your files stay in your cloud service.

form.providerNote: Memora never uploads your files — only the share link is saved.

provider.label: Cloud provider
provider.hint: Where the original file is stored.

url.label: Share URL
url.hint: Paste the public or shareable link to the file or folder.

title.label: Link title
title.hint: A name that tells you what's behind the link.

description.label: Notes
description.placeholder: 12 min of D-log footage. Best light after 17:00…
description.hint: Optional — codec, duration, permissions, or context.

errors.titleMin: Title should be at least 2 characters

designConcepts.title: Design concepts
designConcepts.description: Ten visual directions for Memora — compare palettes, typography, and UI personality before choosing one to implement.
designConcepts.note: These styles are for comparison only. The live app still uses the current Quiet Journal theme.
designConcepts.tokenCount: {count} concepts with full token sets (colors, typography, radius, shadows, components).

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

dashboard.title: Adventures
dashboard.subtitle: All your adventures in one place

home.greetingNote: Every summit, sunset, and side street — preserved for the days you want to feel it all again.

tripSections.title: My adventures
tripSections.activeEmptyDescription: Everything is archived or you have not created an adventure yet.
tripSections.archivedEmptyDescription: Archive adventures you want to keep without showing them in active lists.
tripSections.emptyTitle: You don't have any adventures yet.
tripSections.emptyDescription: Start your first adventure — every journal begins with a single day.

trips.title: My Adventures
trips.subtitle: All your adventures in one place
trips.noResultsDescription: Try a different search or filter.
trips.emptyTitle: You don't have any adventures yet.
trips.emptyDescription: Start your first adventure — every great story begins with a single day.

newTrip.title: Start a new adventure
newTrip.subtitle: Give your next adventure a name, a place, and an opening line.

tripDetail.title: Adventure details
tripDetail.subtitle: What happened, day by day
tripDetail.noDaysDescription: Add your first day — then capture the moments as they happened.
tripDetail.noEventsInDay: A quiet day — or waiting for its first moment.

editTrip.title: Continue story
editTrip.subtitle: Update the details that frame this journey

newEvent.title: Capture a moment
newEvent.subtitle: Add a new entry to this journey's timeline

editEvent.title: Continue moment
editEvent.subtitle: Update the details of a timeline entry

form.title: About you
form.description: This appears on your dashboard home and public portfolio.

tagline.label: Greeting line
tagline.hint: Short phrase under “Welcome back” on the home dashboard. Leave empty for the default text.

bio.label: Bio
bio.hint: Longer description for your public profile.

errors.displayNameMax: Display name must be under 120 characters
errors.taglineMax: Greeting line must be under 500 characters

journal.title: Public journal
journal.description: How others see your page — adventures with Public visibility appear here (except archived).

session.title: Session
session.description: Sign out of your account on this device.

places.title: Places
places.subtitle: Saved locations from your adventures
places.emptyDescription: When you add places to events in your adventures, they will be collected in this section.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Dream destinations and planned routes
wishlist.emptyDescription: Soon you'll be able to save future destinations and dream routes here.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.subtitle: Your personal gear inventory
equipment.noResultsDescription: Try a different search or filter.
equipment.emptyDescription: Add the gear you travel with — tents, bikes, cameras, and everything in between.

newEquipment.title: Add equipment
newEquipment.subtitle: Track a new item in your gear inventory

equipmentDetail.noTrips: Not linked to any adventures yet.

pages.placeholder: This section is coming soon in the authenticated app.

story.title: Name your journey
story.description: Start with a title and a few lines that capture why this adventure matters.

place.title: Where it unfolds
place.description: Country and region help you — and readers — place the story in the world.

dates.title: When you traveled
dates.description: Rough dates are fine. You can refine the day-by-day timeline later.

cover.title: Choose a cover moment
cover.description: Pick a photo that feels like the first page of this chapter.

sharing.title: Visibility & status
sharing.description: Decide who sees this journey and where it sits in your journal.

equipment.title: Adventure gear
equipment.description: Select gear from your inventory — items are reused across adventures, never duplicated.

title.label: Journey title
title.hint: The name you'll remember this adventure by.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: A self-supported loop through mountain passes — cold lakes, hut nights, and long climbs…
description.hint: Write it like the first page of a travel journal, not a summary for a form.

country.label: Country
country.hint: One country or a region that spans borders.

region.label: City / region
region.hint: Cities, valleys, coastlines — whatever anchors the route.

endDate.label: End date
endDate.hint: Leave blank if you're still on the road.

coverImageUrl.label: Cover photo
coverImageUrl.hint: Upload a cover for this adventure.
coverImageUrl.hintCreate: Optional — a gradient placeholder is used when no cover is set.
coverImageUrl.previewError: Couldn't load this image — check the URL

public.label: Public
public.hint: Anyone can discover and read this journey.

private.label: Private
private.hint: Only you can see it — your personal archive.

unlisted.label: Unlisted
unlisted.hint: Hidden from search, but shareable with a direct link.

planning.label: Planning
planning.hint: Still dreaming, researching, or sketching the route.

draft.label: Draft
draft.hint: Writing in progress — not ready to share yet.

published.label: Published
published.hint: Live in your journal, ready for readers.

archived.label: Archived
archived.hint: Kept for memory, tucked away from active view.

in_progress.label: In progress
in_progress.hint: You're on the road — this adventure is unfolding.

completed.label: Completed
completed.hint: The journey is done — memories captured.

footer.create: You can add days, moments, and photos once the journey exists.
footer.edit: Changes here update the adventure overview — your day-by-day timeline stays intact.

success.create: Your adventure is saved — taking you there…
success.edit: Changes saved — back to your adventure…

errors.titleMin: Title should be at least 2 characters
errors.descriptionRequired: Tell us a little about this adventure
errors.descriptionMin: A few more sentences — aim for at least 20 characters
errors.countryRequired: Where did this journey take place?
errors.regionRequired: Add a city or region to anchor the map
errors.endDateBeforeStart: End date can't be before the start
errors.coverUrlRequired: Choose a cover photo for this chapter

delete.title: Delete this adventure?
delete.description: “{title}” will be permanently removed, including its days and moments. This cannot be undone.

archive.title: Archive this adventure?
archive.description: “{title}” will move to Archived and disappear from your active list. You can still open it later.

delete.title: Delete this item?
delete.description: “{name}” will be permanently removed from your inventory.

type.title: Choose the moment type
type.description: Each type shapes how this entry appears in your timeline.

details.title: Name this moment
details.description: A title and a few lines — enough to remember it clearly later.

time.title: Set the time
time.description: Optional — useful for days with many moments.

place.title: Link a place
place.description: Connect this moment to a saved location from the adventure.

order.title: Order in the day
order.description: Lower numbers appear first. Adjust if you're inserting between existing moments.

visibility.title: Who can see this
visibility.description: Control visibility for this moment independently of the adventure.

cloudLinks.title: Cloud links
cloudLinks.description: Link to large drone footage, raw video, or folders stored in Google Drive, iCloud, and other services.

title.label: Moment title
title.hint: Short and specific — like a journal heading.

description.label: Notes
description.placeholder: Wind from the west, clouds lifting, legs still warm from the climb…
description.hint: Sensory details, context, or anything you'd want to remember.

startTime.label: Start time
startTime.hint: Leave blank if the time doesn't matter.

endTime.label: End time
endTime.hint: For stretches — a hike, a meal, a ride.

place.label: Place
place.hint: Optional — pick from places saved on this adventure.

SLEEP.description: Where you rested — camp, hut, or hotel.

HIKE.description: Trails, summits, and miles on foot.

PLACE_VISIT.description: A town, museum, or stop worth noting.

PHOTO_VIDEO.description: Photos, videos, drone clips, and cloud media.

EXPENSE.description: Costs worth tracking on the road.

TIP.description: Advice you'd give a future traveler.

public.label: Public
public.hint: Visible to anyone reading this journey.

private.label: Private
private.hint: Only you — a personal note in the timeline.

unlisted.label: Unlisted
unlisted.hint: Hidden from browse, shareable by link.

footer.create: Photos and cloud links can be attached after the moment is saved.
footer.edit: Updates here change this entry — the rest of your timeline stays as is.
footer.createWithCloud: Cloud links are saved with this moment — files stay in your cloud service.
footer.editWithCloud: Cloud link changes are saved with this moment — files stay in your cloud service.

success.create: Moment saved — back to your adventure…
success.edit: Moment updated — back to your adventure…

errors.typeRequired: Choose what kind of moment this is
errors.titleMin: Title should be at least 2 characters
errors.endTimeBeforeStart: End time can't be before start

identity.title: Item identity
identity.description: Name, category, brand, and model — the basics for your inventory.

specs.title: Weight & purchase
specs.description: Track grams for base-weight stats and optional purchase details.

details.title: Status & notes
details.description: Mark retired gear inactive and add context you'll want later.

photo.title: Photo
photo.description: Optional image URL for quick recognition in your gear list.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Short label — Tent, Sleeping Bag, Drone…

notes.label: Notes
notes.hint: How you use it, conditions, upgrades…

isActive.label: Status
isActive.hint: Inactive items stay in inventory but won't appear in selectors.

photoUrl.label: Photo URL
photoUrl.hint: Paste a link to an image

errors.weightMin: Weight must be at least 1 gram
errors.weightMax: Weight seems too high — check the value

equipmentCategorySelector.searchHint: Search or add your own category

name.label: Category name
name.hint: e.g. GPS Watch, Hammock, Dry Bag

icon.label: Icon
icon.hint: Pick an icon for quick recognition

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.nameMax: Name must be at most 48 characters

equipmentSelector.emptyInventory: No active equipment in your inventory yet.

tripDayForm.addDescription: Group everything that happened on one calendar date.
tripDayForm.editDescription: Update the date, title, or notes for this day.

title.label: Title
title.hint: Optional — a short headline for the day

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: What happened, how it felt, what you want to remember…

activities.label: Activities
activities.hint: Describe the day in up to 3 tags.

delete.title: Delete this day?
delete.description: {label} will be removed from the timeline along with its events. This cannot be undone.

errors.titleMax: Title must be at most 120 characters
errors.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 500 characters

tripEventModal.addDescription: Capture a moment that happened on this day.
tripEventModal.addDescriptionShort: Pick a type, name it, save — details can wait.
tripEventModal.editDescription: Update the details of this moment.

sections.cloudLinksHint: Link to large video files stored externally.

title.label: Title
title.hint: Short and specific — like a journal heading.

description.label: Note
description.placeholder: Route details, mood, what stood out…

mealType.label: Meal type
mealType.hint: What kind of meal was this?

photos.label: Photo
photos.hint: Optional — attach images to any moment type.
photos.hintSingle: Optional — one photo per moment for now.
photos.empty: No photos yet — paste a link or upload from your device.
photos.urlInvalid: Enter a valid http or https URL

gpx.label: GPX track
gpx.hint: Coming soon — upload a route file.

place.label: Place
place.hint: Search saved places or create a new one inline.
place.optionalHint: Optional — skip if you don't remember the name.

delete.title: Delete this moment?
delete.description: “{title}” will be removed from the timeline. This cannot be undone.

errors.titleMin: Title must be at least 2 characters
errors.titleMax: Title must be at most 120 characters
errors.endTimeBeforeStart: End time must be after start time
errors.distanceMin: Distance must be zero or greater
errors.elevationMin: Elevation must be zero or greater
errors.formInvalid: Check the form — some fields are invalid.
errors.saveError: Could not save the event. Please try again.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.nameMax: Name must be at most 120 characters
errors.addressMax: Address must be at most 200 characters

tripEquipment.title: Equipment used
tripEquipment.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} · {weight} base weight
tripEquipment.empty: No equipment linked to this adventure yet.
